text:
Made a toy maker with Fable this morning 🧸

Snap wooden pieces together, make parts spin, watch them come alive.

Make your own:
https://t.co/GJCG6CXmrT

Remix mine:
https://t.co/Iif38yoVkC

Made with box3d.js by @erin_catto and @isaac_mason_ https://t.co/c5eSqV54DH
